tools.name: audit_trace
tools.description: Full audit of an agent execution trace. Detects infinite loops, duplicate calls, tool errors, cost overruns, schema violations, and latency bottlenecks. Returns verdict (pass/review/block), score 0-100, and detailed findings.

tools.name: quick_verdict
tools.description: Fast pass/review/block verdict with score and issue counts. Use in CI gates.

tools.name: diff_traces
tools.description: Compare two agent traces to detect regressions. Returns score delta, cost delta, added/removed tools, new/resolved issue types.
